# Nektra Energy Solutions

> Authorized Exide industrial battery dealer in Hyderabad, India. 35+ years of experience powering 10+ industries across Telangana.

Nektra Energy Solutions is a trusted authorized dealer for Exide Industries Limited, India's largest battery manufacturer. We specialize in industrial traction batteries, forklift batteries, and motive power solutions for warehouses, manufacturing plants, pharmaceutical facilities, and more.

## Company Details

- Location: Chandanagar, Hyderabad, Telangana 500099, India
- Phone: +91 9187615904
- Email: info@nektraenergy.com
- Hours: Mon-Sat 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM
- Service Area: Pan-Telangana (Hyderabad, Secunderabad, and all of Telangana)
- Website: https://nektraenergy.com

## Products

- [Motive Power Flooded Tubular Batteries](https://nektraenergy.com/products/motive-power-flooded-tubular): Exide's flagship traction batteries in DIN and BS configurations. 1500+ cycles at 80% DoD.
- [Motive Power Gel Batteries (CEIL)](https://nektraenergy.com/products/motive-power-gel): Zero-maintenance gel batteries for clean rooms and sensitive environments.
- [HSP Classic Batteries](https://nektraenergy.com/products/hsp-classic): High-performance tubular batteries for heavy-duty applications.
- [Gen-X Batteries](https://nektraenergy.com/products/gen-x): Next-generation batteries with enhanced cycle life and fast charging.
- [BCI Range Batteries](https://nektraenergy.com/products/bci-range): BCI standard batteries for North American forklift brands.
- [Battery Accessories & Monitoring](https://nektraenergy.com/products/accessories): Watering systems, monitoring systems, smart clamps, and electrolyte circulation.

## Services

- [Battery Installation](https://nektraenergy.com/services/battery-installation): Free professional installation with every purchase.
- [Testing & Diagnostics](https://nektraenergy.com/services/testing-diagnostics): Comprehensive battery health assessment.
- [Battery Replacement](https://nektraenergy.com/services/battery-replacement): End-to-end replacement with proper disposal.
- [Old Battery Exchange](https://nektraenergy.com/services/old-battery-exchange): Trade-in value for old batteries.
- [Doorstep Delivery](https://nektraenergy.com/services/doorstep-delivery): Free delivery across Telangana.
- [Emergency Service](https://nektraenergy.com/services/emergency-service): Same-day emergency support.
- [Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC)](https://nektraenergy.com/services/amc): Scheduled preventive maintenance plans.
- [Equalizing Charge Service](https://nektraenergy.com/services/equalizing-charge): Specialized deep-charge service for cell balancing.
- [Onsite Service](https://nektraenergy.com/services/onsite-service): Pan-Telangana onsite technician visits.

## About Exide Industries

Exide Industries Limited is India's largest and South/Southeast Asia's #1 battery manufacturer, established in 1947 in Kolkata. 9 manufacturing plants, USD 1.3 Billion turnover, serving 45+ countries. Certifications: ISO 9001, ISO 14001, OHSAS 18001. Nektra Energy Solutions is an authorized dealer for Exide's industrial/traction battery range.
